odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
        

            
            
            OSTiM Teknik Universitesi - Spor Salonu
            
        
        

            
            

                

                    

                        
                
                        
                        

                            
OSTiM TEKNiK
                            
UNiVERSiTESi
                            
ANKARA
                        
                    

                    

                        TR
                        |
                        EN
                    
                
            

            
            

                
SPOR SALONU GiRiS
                
Spor salonuna giris icin ogrenci bilgilerinizi giriniz
                

            

            
            

                

                    
                        

                            
✓
                            

                                
Giris Basarili!
                                
Hos geldiniz!
Spor salonundan yararlanabilirsiniz.
                                Sure:  dakika
                            
                            

                                
Entry Successful!
                                
Welcome!
You can now use the sports facility.
                                Duration:  minutes
                            
                        
                    

                    
                        
Ogrenci Bilgileri

                        
                            

                        

                        
                            
                            

                            

                                

                                    AD
                                    
                                
                                

                                    SOYAD
                                    
                                
                            

                            

                                OGRENCI NUMARASI
                                
                            

                            

                                BOLUM
                                
                            

                            


                            
                                SALONA GIRIS YAP
                            
                        
                    
                
            

            
            

                

                    OSTiM TEKNiK UNiVERSiTESi
                    

                    SPOR MERKEZi
                    

                    ANKARA
                
            

            
                var T = {
                    tr: {
                        title: 'SPOR SALONU GiRiS',
                        sub: 'Spor salonuna giris icin ogrenci bilgilerinizi giriniz',
                        cardLabel: 'Ogrenci Bilgileri',
                        name: 'AD', surname: 'SOYAD',
                        number: 'OGRENCI NUMARASI', dept: 'BOLUM',
                        namePh: 'Adiniz', surnamePh: 'Soyadiniz',
                        numberPh: 'Ornek: 2021123456',
                        deptPh: 'Ornek: Bilgisayar Muhendisligi',
                        submit: 'SALONA GIRIS YAP'
                    },
                    en: {
                        title: 'GYM ENTRY',
                        sub: 'Please enter your student information to access the gym',
                        cardLabel: 'Student Information',
                        name: 'FIRST NAME', surname: 'LAST NAME',
                        number: 'STUDENT NUMBER', dept: 'DEPARTMENT',
                        namePh: 'Your first name', surnamePh: 'Your last name',
                        numberPh: 'Example: 2021123456',
                        deptPh: 'Example: Computer Engineering',
                        submit: 'ENTER THE GYM'
                    }
                };

                function setLang(lang) {
                    var t = T[lang];
                    var g = function(id) { return document.getElementById(id); };

                    if (g('main-title')) g('main-title').textContent = t.title;
                    if (g('main-sub')) g('main-sub').textContent = t.sub;
                    if (g('card-label')) g('card-label').textContent = t.cardLabel;
                    if (g('lbl-name')) g('lbl-name').textContent = t.name;
                    if (g('lbl-surname')) g('lbl-surname').textContent = t.surname;
                    if (g('lbl-number')) g('lbl-number').textContent = t.number;
                    if (g('lbl-dept')) g('lbl-dept').textContent = t.dept;
                    if (g('inp-name')) g('inp-name').placeholder = t.namePh;
                    if (g('inp-surname')) g('inp-surname').placeholder = t.surnamePh;
                    if (g('inp-number')) g('inp-number').placeholder = t.numberPh;
                    if (g('inp-dept')) g('inp-dept').placeholder = t.deptPh;
                    if (g('btn-submit')) g('btn-submit').textContent = t.submit;
                    if (g('lang-input')) g('lang-input').value = lang;

                    if (g('success-tr')) g('success-tr').style.display = lang === 'tr' ? 'block' : 'none';
                    if (g('success-en')) g('success-en').style.display = lang === 'en' ? 'block' : 'none';

                    g('btn-tr').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'tr');
                    g('btn-en').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'en');
                }
